text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 58 

MDCD_TOTAL_NON_CAPTD_SPEND 

LABEL: Medicaid Payment Amount — Non-Capitated Total 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the sum of Medicaid payment amount from other services (OT) (header) claims for the 
beneficiary during the year, after removing the Medicaid managed care capitated payments. Note that 
this dollar amount may be an undercount if the beneficiary had managed care claims. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS
